projects.title: GardaWorld HRMS
projects.subtitle: Human Resource Management System
projects.problem: Thousands of employee records managed on paper with no access control, no audit trail and no way to query history.
projects.contribution: Designed the full system architecture, role-based access control, database schema and business operations (Payroll, Leave Management, Deployment and Attendance Tracking, Performance Evaluation etc.).

projects.title: Car Hire Business Management System
projects.subtitle: Customer Website & Management Software
projects.problem: The business needed a public platform for customers to book car hire services, paired with an internal management tool to handle day-to-day business operations.
projects.contribution: Developed a dynamic car hire website and built a companion cross-platform application (APK + exe) for internal administration and business operation management.

projects.title: M-Pesa STK Push
projects.subtitle: Payment Integration Module
projects.problem: Businesses needed a reliable way to trigger mobile payments programmatically without manual customer input.
projects.contribution: Built a Laravel package wrapping the Safaricom Daraja API, handling callbacks, payment updates on different screens, timeouts and transaction logging. Which was later shipped to production development

projects.title: Auth & Cryptographic Security
projects.subtitle: Mandatory Access Control (MAC) & Encryption Suite
projects.problem: Standard framework authentication lacked strict data-at-rest encryption and failed to enforce strict Mandatory Role Based Access Control needed for high-compliance HR and financial environments.
projects.contribution: I designed and implemented a security engine featuring a Role Based Access Control (RBAC) policy, end-to-end database encryption for sensitive data and secure token authentication. Successfully implemented this engine as the core security layer for both HR Management System and the commercial Car Hire application.
